results.title: NEET UG 2026 final answer key released; one question dropped
results.description: Candidates can download NEET UG 2026 final answer key for re-examination on the official portal at neet.nta.nic.in.

results.title: Happy Streets one last time in Whitefield
results.description: Times of India’s Happy Streets hosts its final Whitefield edition in Bengaluru on Sunday, featuring meditation, yoga, fitness, dance, music, quizzes and comedy.

results.title: Sea of devotees fill streets with vibrant processions across Jharkhand
results.description: Jharkhand’s Rath Yatra drew massive crowds in Jamshedpur, Bokaro, Hazaribag and Dhanbad, with ISKCON-led processions, rituals and tight security.
